title: After America’s 250th, Trump will test how far he can push NATO allies
description: As NATO leaders gather in Turkey, they are preparing for another summit shaped as much by managing President Donald Trump as by the alliance's security agenda.

title: Marriage used to be a glide path to citizenship. Now there are more speed bumps
description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.

title: Democrats and Republicans pitch different visions of America on July 4th
description: Both parties used the Fourth of July holiday to pitch their vision for the country.

title: How Trump marked the 250th anniversary of independence
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks to Sarah Isgur, senior editor at The Dispatch, about President Trump's celebration of the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence.

title: Ex-Marine says military veterans running for office advance bipartisan politics
description: A former Marine says in a new book that military veterans running for office can bring Washington the courage to work across party lines.

title: Some voters in Louisville, Kentucky, got wrong ballots for years
description: Some voters in Louisville. Kentucky have been voting given the wrong ballots in elections for several years. That's the result of an investigation by Louisville Public Media

title: Netanyahu wants meeting with Trump as Israel continues Lebanon strikes
description: Tens of millions attend Ayatollah's funeral and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu wants a sit down with Trump.

title: Trump won spending promises from NATO last year. This week, he'll try to enforce them
description: President Donald Trump is heading to Ankara, Turkey, for the annual NATO summit. Last year, he pushed NATO allies to spend more on defense. This year, his mission is to try to enforce those pledges.

title: Politics chat: Trump's July 4 speech, financial disclosures; Supreme Court rulings
description: We take a look at President Trump's July 4th speech, as well as his reluctance to sign the bipartisan housing bill intended to help make homes affordable for Americans.

title: Paul Pelosi in hit-and-run in California, car left with major damage, authorities say
description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.

title: In Mount Rushmore speech, Trump veers from U.S. exceptionalism to warnings about communism
description: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.
